title: Saudi Arabian Squash Wrap
description: A flavorful and healthy wrap filled with roasted squash, mellow spices, and crispy Arabian-style bread.
instructions: Toss the squash cubes with olive oil, mellow, and arabian in a bowl.
Spread the squash mixture on a baking sheet and roast for 25-30 minutes, or until tender.
Warm the wrap in the oven for 2-3 minutes, or until crispy.
Assemble the wrap by spreading the roasted squash down the center, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Fold the bottom edge of the wrap up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll up the wrap to form a tight cylinder.
